name: Cloudflare
description: Cloudflare Pages deployment with backup, verification, and diff review

commands.cf:deploy: Verify, diff, backup, and deploy to Cloudflare Pages
commands.cf:verify: Verify static output is complete and ready to deploy
commands.cf:status: Compare local static files against last deployed backup
commands.cf:backup: Create a backup of current static output
commands.cf:backups: List or clean up deployment backups
